## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code — types + Zod schemas + the relevant module
- [ ] Tests — Vitest unit tests for the new behavior; existing tests pass
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Backlog item moved to `docs/resolved.md` (if applicable)
